---
title: "Resources for Chapter 5: <br>Probability"
author: 

output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float: 
      collapsed: false
    includes:
      before_body: header_image.html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

***

<br> 

# Data

Chapter 5 has no associated data.

Download a .zip file with all data sets in the book [here](DataZipFiles/Data.zip).
